fallback.title: Problem detected
fallback.message: Something went wrong. Try again or contact support if the problem continues.

access_denied.title: Access denied
access_denied.message: Your account cannot perform this action.

validation.title: Information to correct
validation.message: Check the fields and try again.

not_found.title: Item not found
not_found.message: The requested resource is no longer available.

conflict.title: Action unavailable
conflict.message: The current state does not allow this action.

rate_limited.title: Too many requests
rate_limited.message: Wait a moment before trying again.

network_unavailable.title: Connection unavailable
network_unavailable.message: Check the connection and try again.

service_unavailable.title: Service temporarily unavailable
service_unavailable.message: Part of the service is temporarily unavailable.

unexpected.title: Problem detected
unexpected.message: Something went wrong. Try again or contact support if the problem continues.

missing_parameter.title: Missing information
missing_parameter.message: Required information is missing. Check the form and try again.

not_readable.title: Invalid request
not_readable.message: Some submitted information cannot be read. Check the form and try again.

type_mismatch.title: Invalid format
type_mismatch.message: A value does not have the expected format. Check the highlighted field and try again.

constraint_violation.title: Information to correct
constraint_violation.message: Correct the highlighted fields and try again.

failed.title: Information to correct
failed.message: Correct the highlighted fields and try again.

error.title: Account activation incomplete
error.message: Your workspace is still accessible, but an account check could not finish.
